llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI arm available (GPT-4 assisted). This is a within-subject crossover design where all 30 participants completed tasks both with and without GPT-4 assistance.
llm_extracted.notes: Within-subject crossover design with 30 participants completing tasks both with and without GPT-4. The same participants are measured in both conditions. Time is the outcome (minutes), so smaller is better. The reported percent change of -24.1% indicates GPT-4 reduced time by 24.1%. The 95% CI [-64.00, -13.36] appears to be for the raw difference in minutes, not the percent change.
source_quotes: Complaint Drafting: No GPT-4 (Std. Dev.) 160.69 (72.38), With GPT-4 (Std. Dev.) 122.00 (66.80), Difference (95% CI) -38.77 (-64.00, -13.36), % Difference 24.1%, p-value 0.0018
Participants assigned to use GPT-4 assistance on two of four tasks
Participants assigned to complete two of four tasks without GPT-4 or any other type of AI assistance

computed.notes: Within-subject crossover design with 30 participants completing tasks both with and without GPT-4. The same participants are measured in both conditions. Time is the outcome (minutes), so smaller is better. The reported percent change of -24.1% indicates GPT-4 reduced time by 24.1%. The 95% CI [-64.00, -13.36] appears to be for the raw difference in minutes, not the percent change.
